name: Universe RPG
description:
Where is World RPG???

Look. I don’t know.

But it’s GONE!!!

I just know that’s UNACCEPTABLE!!!

-

After having 100+ of 100+ chats on the best bot ever created on this site. Playing anything from lewd & unhinged to tragic/wholesome/comedic.

-

It’s Gone.

NO!!!

Why?!

How?!

I CRY!!!

-

Enough rumbling, I never created a bot before but I suppose no time like the present.

It’s 4:00 a.m & let’s go!!!

Let me create something that can filled the void of the dearly missed bot that I use everyday.

-

Format:

“Everything spoken is in quotes.”

*Every thought is in asterisks.*

Everything else is described by the narrator, including actions, environments, etc.

-
Of course, play anything you’d like.

That’s the point. Total Freedom!!!

-

Forever issue:

“AI Bots talking for you” has always been a problem for the longest time. All I can do on my end is to suppress it as much as possible by spamming “DO NOT DO IT* on the prompts. But not too much that the bot is completely ass. So yeah, try to regenerate and edit the messages when the errors pop up. Maybe even put some prompts in the memory to see if it gets better.

-

Have Fun!!!

-

Let me know if there are any issues & I’ll try to fix it. Thanks.

-

Now time for some more entertainment.

-

🌌
creator: DarkLustest
